transcript: Speaker A: आप इंग्लिश क्यों नहीं बोल पा रहे हैं? [Why aren't you able to speak English?] Speaker B: मैंने इंग्लिश मीडियम में पढ़ाई नहीं की है सर। [I didn't study in English medium, sir.] Speaker A: ओहो! [Oh!] Speaker C: बोलने की प्रैक्टिस के लिए कोई हेल्प नहीं करता सर। [No one helps with speaking practice, sir.] Speaker A: ओहो! [Oh!] Speaker D: सीखने के लिए टाइम नहीं है सर। [There is no time to learn, sir.] Speaker A: अहा! तो अगर मौका मिले तो सीखोगे, है ना? Speaker D: हाँ सर। [Yes, sir.] Speaker A: तो MySivi App पे प्रैक्टिस करो। यहाँ आपका लेवल समझकर उसी हिसाब से सिखाने वाला एक AI teacher है। और प्रैक्टिस करने के लिए 1 करोड़ से ज्यादा co-learners भी हैं। ये लो, इससे अच्छा मौका नहीं मिलेगा। और आप? कोई और एक्सक्यूज रखा है क्या? अगर अपनी इंग्लिश इम्प्रूव करनी है तो अभी तुरंत MySivi App पे ट्रेनिंग शुरू करो। [Then practice on MySivi App. Here there is an AI teacher who understands your level and teaches accordingly. And there are over 1 crore co-learners to practice with. Here, you won't get a better opportunity than this. And you? Do you have any other excuse? If you want to improve your English, start training on MySivi App right now.] Speaker E: Install Now पर क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: aap English kyo [why you English], medium me parhai [studied in medium], bolane ki practice [practice of speaking], sikhane ke liye [for learning], to MySivi App [then MySivi App], MySivi, Start English Learning - MySivi, 10M+ Downloads, Install, Sivi is NOW MySivi, Improve English speaking with AI, About this app: Start your English learning with a Trial at No Cost | Practice English Now, koi aur excuse [any other excuse], right now!, MySivi AI English Speaking App, Master Spoken Eng, Sharpen your English 1-on-1 calls. Try MySivi fast, MySivi English speaking app, Install Now
summary: The host addresses common excuses for not speaking English, such as lack of practice partners or time. He introduces MySivi as the ultimate solution, featuring an adaptive AI teacher and over 10 million co-learners. The ad concludes with a call to action to install the app.
